frontend/src/App.tsx.reason: Main app shell (2544 lines after mobile refactor follow-up). Mobile UI JSX remains in dedicated components/mobile/*; this file only holds shared state/handlers and mobile overlay wiring. Default model selection logic was extracted to components/mobile/modelSelection.ts during review; further App.tsx growth should be blocked unless paired with additional extraction.

frontend/src/styles.css.reason: Global CSS: variables, layout, component styles, Ant Design overrides, responsive breakpoints. Cascade-dependent.

src/ashare_evidence/analysis_pipeline.py.reason: Analysis pipeline: announcement body fetching, LLM enrichment, financial trends. Cohesive pipeline definition.

src/ashare_evidence/api.py.reason: FastAPI application with 25+ endpoints across 6 route groups (dashboard, simulation, settings, manual-research, watchlist, stocks). 706 lines is proportional to API surface — ~28 lines per endpoint average. Router extraction would add boilerplate without reducing complexity.

src/ashare_evidence/cli.py.reason: CLI command group: data refresh, cache management, admin operations.

src/ashare_evidence/dashboard.py.reason: Dashboard views with direction labels and factor cards. Minor growth from label additions.

src/ashare_evidence/intraday_market.py.reason: Intraday market data: fetching, caching, status tracking. Single responsibility.

src/ashare_evidence/manual_research_work.reason: Manual research workflow: request creation, execution, completion, retry. Single workflow.

src/ashare_evidence/models.py.reason: SQLAlchemy ORM models: Stock, Recommendation, PaperOrder, PaperPortfolio. Naturally cohesive.

src/ashare_evidence/operations.py.reason: Operations dashboard builder with tightly coupled payload functions, order checks, and shared module-level constants (MODE_LABELS, PositionState). Extraction attempted 2026-04-28 — dependency cascade risk.

src/ashare_evidence/phase2/holding_polic.reason: Phase 2 holding policy experiment runner: sweep execution, result collection. Cohesive experiment.
Phase 2 holding policy study definition: parameters, backtest config, analysis. Cohesive study.

src/ashare_evidence/release_verifier.py.reason: Release verification: build check, health check, parity verification. Single workflow.

src/ashare_evidence/runtime_config.py.reason: Runtime configuration management: settings resolution, defaults, validation. Single responsibility.

src/ashare_evidence/schemas.py.reason: 60+ Pydantic models with cross-references (StockDashboardResponse, OperationsDashboardResponse aggregate types from all domains). Domain split carries medium risk due to model inheritance chains and runtime validation dependencies. Planned but deferred for test coverage.

src/ashare_evidence/services.py.reason: Service layer: recommendation serialization, claim gate, direction capping.

src/ashare_evidence/signal_engine_parts/.reason: Fusion engine with dynamic weights, conflict resolution, multi-factor integration (price/news/fundamental).

src/ashare_evidence/simulation.py.reason: Cohesive simulation engine: position sizing, performance metrics, scenario config, order execution. Single-domain logic with tight internal coupling.

tests/test_dashboard_views.py.reason: Dashboard view contract tests. Current growth locks mobile today's price chart and manual research builtin/default model behavior; split remains lower priority than preserving broad frontend/backend contract coverage.

frontend/src/components/OperationsTabs.t.reason: Operations dashboard tabs (portfolio, simulation, replay, research validation, launch readiness). Could be further split into per-tab components.

src/ashare_evidence/signal_engine_parts/.reason: Multi-factor computation module: price, news, fundamental, size, reversal, liquidity factors with cross-sectional normalization. Cohesive factor definition.
